user.title: Create a Hydronicus plant
user.description: New plants begin in shadow mode and do not control equipment.

zone.title: Add the first comfort zone
zone.description: Select one or more temperature sensors and an aggregation policy. Enable detailed sensor editing to configure required status, calibration, freshness, designated reference, and weights one sensor at a time.

sensor_metadata.title: Edit temperature sensor
sensor_metadata.description: Configure this sensor explicitly. A required sensor blocks the zone when stale or unavailable. Weighted mean is available only after every selected sensor has this editable path.

sensor_policy.title: Choose sensor aggregation
sensor_policy.description: All selected sensors have editable metadata.

circuit.title: Add the first hydraulic circuit
circuit.description: Equipment is observed only in this release. No service calls are made.

review.title: Review shadow topology

error.invalid_topology: The initial topology is not valid.
error.sensor_metadata_required: Select detailed sensor editing before using weighted mean or designated reference aggregation.

user.title: Add a valve actuator
user.description: Attach a shadow-mode valve to one or more existing circuits.

reconfigure.title: Update valve actuator
reconfigure.description: Change the valve binding, opening time, or attached circuits.

review.title: Review actuator warnings
review.description:
Review these non-fatal topology warnings before saving:
{warnings}

error.invalid_actuator: The actuator cannot be attached to this topology.
error.confirm_required: Confirm that you understand these warnings before saving.

abort.no_circuits: Add a hydraulic circuit before adding an actuator.

user.title: Add a hydraulic circuit
user.description: Connect existing plant equipment to one or more comfort zones in shadow mode.

reconfigure.title: Update hydraulic circuit
reconfigure.description: Change the circuit name, equipment path, or served zones.

review.title: Review circuit warnings
review.description:
Review these non-fatal topology warnings before saving:
{warnings}

error.invalid_circuit: The circuit cannot be added to this topology.
error.confirm_required: Confirm that you understand these warnings before saving.

abort.incomplete_plant: The plant needs at least one zone, valve, and pump before adding a circuit.

user.title: Add a comfort zone
user.description: Select one or more temperature sensors, choose an aggregation policy, and route the zone through existing circuits in shadow mode. Enable detailed sensor editing to configure required status, calibration, freshness, designated reference, and weights one sensor at a time.

reconfigure.title: Update comfort zone
reconfigure.description: Change the zone target, temperature sensors, aggregation policy, or available circuits. Enable detailed sensor editing to configure required status, calibration, freshness, designated reference, and weights one sensor at a time.

sensor_metadata.title: Edit temperature sensor
sensor_metadata.description: Configure this sensor explicitly. Required sensors block the zone when stale or unavailable.

sensor_policy.title: Choose sensor aggregation
sensor_policy.description: All selected sensors have editable metadata.

review.title: Review zone warnings
review.description:
Review these non-fatal topology warnings before saving:
{warnings}

error.invalid_zone: The zone cannot be added to this topology.
error.sensor_metadata_required: Enable detailed sensor editing before using weighted mean or designated reference aggregation.
error.confirm_required: Confirm that you understand these warnings before saving.

abort.no_circuits: Add a hydraulic circuit before adding a zone.
